title: How To Start Faceless YouTube From Scratch In 2026?

transcript.text: If I woke up with $0 in followers tomorrow and wanted to build a faceless YouTube channel, here's what [music] I would do in 2026. So, step one, I determine the market I know best. It might be fitness, finance, [music] entertainment, history, or any other of these 10. Step two, decide what format to choose. Simple formats like AI skeleton and the whiteboard influencers are cheaper but have more competitors. 3D or complicated AI formats like black files, art of war or ZEC films are more bulletproof against competition but require a bigger team to operate. And my favorite for 2026 is 2D animation like Universal Labs, Renrod [music] or Paint Explainer. They protect you from competition and only require one or two team members to run. Once you choose the format from one of these three, next step is to bend this format from one niche to another, creating a unique combination that the market hasn't seen before. like the bananas example that was banned from finance to fitness or AI skeleton which was banned from anatomy to pets. And if you want a deeper dive into [music] the niche bending strategy that allows you to create unique faceless YouTube niches, I'm hosting a live workshop on February 25th where I'm going to give you more than 500 readytouse niches and over a,000 niche bands with unique combinations.
